title: Cameron Klement: A journey from law to luxury living
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Life has a funny way of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Life has a funny way of leading us exactly where we’re meant to be. For Cameron Klement, that path started in the legal industry, took a detour through wellness, and ultimately landed in the world of real estate, an industry where his passion for people, service, and property has truly found its home.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Life has a funny way of leading us exactly where we’re meant to be. For Cameron Klement, that path started in the legal industry, took a detour through wellness, and ultimately landed in the world of real estate, an industry where his passion for people, service, and property has truly found its home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After earning his degree in 2001, Cameron’s career kicked off in the fast-paced legal sector, navigating the complexities of employee benefits and mining contracts. While he thrived in this structured environment, his love for personal connections and creating positive experiences pulled him toward the wellness industry.","html":"After earning his degree in 2001, Cameron’s career kicked off in the fast-paced legal sector, navigating the complexities of employee benefits and mining contracts. While he thrived in this structured environment, his love for personal connections and creating positive experiences pulled him toward the wellness industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here, he honed his skills in sales, management, and training, ensuring that no matter the industry, the client’s experience always came first.","html":"Here, he honed his skills in sales, management, and training, ensuring that no matter the industry, the client’s experience always came first."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But real estate? That was always in the background, quietly calling his name.","html":"But real estate? That was always in the background, quietly calling his name."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Managing his own and his family’s property portfolios over the years—ranging from private homes to sectional titles and even commercial real estate—gave Cameron firsthand experience in the art of buying, selling, and maintaining properties.","html":"Managing his own and his family’s property portfolios over the years—ranging from private homes to sectional titles and even commercial real estate—gave Cameron firsthand experience in the art of buying, selling, and maintaining properties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pam Smit and Cameron Klement. Photo: Supplied","html":"Pam Smit and Cameron Klement. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Managing his own and his family’s property portfolios over the years—ranging from private homes to sectional titles and even commercial real estate—gave Cameron firsthand experience in the art of buying, selling, and maintaining properties.","html":"Managing his own and his family’s property portfolios over the years—ranging from private homes to sectional titles and even commercial real estate—gave Cameron firsthand experience in the art of buying, selling, and maintaining properties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the opportunity arose to relocate to the breathtaking Garden Route, it felt like the perfect moment to embrace real estate professionally.","html":"When the opportunity arose to relocate to the breathtaking Garden Route, it felt like the perfect moment to embrace real estate professionally."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Now, as a real estate professional, Cameron brings two decades of top-tier client service to the table. He understands that buying or selling a home is more than a transaction—it’s a milestone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cameron Klement and Sharon Korsten. Photo: Supplied","html":"Cameron Klement and Sharon Korsten. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His goal? To make the experience seamless, rewarding, and even enjoyable.","html":"His goal? To make the experience seamless, rewarding, and even enjoyable."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With his legal know-how, wellness-driven people skills, and personal experience in property, Cameron is committed to guiding you through the journey with confidence and care.","html":"With his legal know-how, wellness-driven people skills, and personal experience in property, Cameron is committed to guiding you through the journey with confidence and care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re looking for your dream home or ready to move on to your next adventure, Cameron is here to make it happen—professionally, pleasantly, and with a touch of the extraordinary.","html":"Whether you’re looking for your dream home or ready to move on to your next adventure, Cameron is here to make it happen—professionally, pleasantly, and with a touch of the extraordinary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cameron Klement and Sharon Korsten. Photo: Supplied","html":"Cameron Klement and Sharon Korsten. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Natasha Jafta, Sharon Korsten, Pam Smit, Shareden Arries, Cameron Klement, and Talia Halderman. Photo: Supplied","html":"Natasha Jafta, Sharon Korsten, Pam Smit, Shareden Arries, Cameron Klement, and Talia Halderman. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shareden Arries, Talia Halderman, Natasha Jafta, Sharon Korsten, Cameron Klement, and Pam Smit. Photo: Supplied","html":"Shareden Arries, Talia Halderman, Natasha Jafta, Sharon Korsten, Cameron Klement, and Pam Smit. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Left to right first row: Gail Rimbault, Samuel Seeff, Sharon Korsten, Penny Rice. Left to right second row: Vickey Du Toit, Pam Smit, Natasha Jafta, Tina Brown, Cameron Klement, Talia Halderman, Shariefa Jantjies, Tracy Boomer, Shareden Arries, Norma Soule. Photo: Supplied","html":"Left to right first row: Gail Rimbault, Samuel Seeff, Sharon Korsten, Penny Rice. Left to right second row: Vickey Du Toit, Pam Smit, Natasha Jafta, Tina Brown, Cameron Klement, Talia Halderman, Shariefa Jantjies, Tracy Boomer, Shareden Arries, Norma Soule. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shareden Arries, Cameron Klement, Talia Halderman. Photo: Supplied","html":"Shareden Arries, Cameron Klement, Talia Halderman. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Left to right first row: Shareden Arries, Courtney Giannone, Natasha Jafta, Norma Soule, Pam Smit. Left to right second row: Vickey Du Toit, Daena Pendock, Tina Brown, Cameron Klement, and Taryn Van Rooyen. Photo: Supplied","html":"Left to right first row: Shareden Arries, Courtney Giannone, Natasha Jafta, Norma Soule, Pam Smit. Left to right second row: Vickey Du Toit, Daena Pendock, Tina Brown, Cameron Klement, and Taryn Van Rooyen. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"- Ryan Faulds","html":"- Ryan Faulds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
